Built for every type of video creator

Whether you upload weekly vlogs, full-length courses, or corporate training videos — TimestampAI works for you.

Content Creators

Add clickable chapter timestamps to every video automatically. Chapters show on the progress bar, in search results, and as a list below your video — boosting watch time and return visitors.

Why TimestampAI

Stop wasting time writing timestamps manually

Manual timestamp writing takes 20–40 minutes per video. TimestampAI does the same job in under 30 seconds — with better accuracy than doing it by hand.

Without TimestampAI
  • ✕ 20–40 min per video, manually
  • ✕ Easy to miss topic transitions
  • ✕ Inconsistent quality across videos
  • ✕ No time to do it for older videos
  • ✕ Human error in timecodes

Learn

What are YouTube timestamps & chapters?

A complete guide to YouTube chapter timestamps — what they are, why they matter, and how AI generates them for you instantly.

4 min read YouTube Guide SEO Tips
youtube.com/watch?v=...
14:32
5:29 14:32
Chapters
0:00 Introduction & Overview
1:23 Getting Started
3:45 Core Concepts
7:10 Advanced Tips
12:30 Summary & Next Steps
1

What are YouTube timestamps?

YouTube timestamps are time markers added to a video's description that let viewers jump directly to any topic. When formatted correctly, YouTube converts them into interactive chapter markers — visible on the scrubber bar and as a clickable chapters list below the video.

Chapters appear as a segmented progress bar on desktop & mobile, and as a "Chapters" panel — making long content effortless to navigate.

2

Why chapters matter for your channel

Videos with chapters consistently outperform those without across every metric YouTube's algorithm rewards:

↑ 18%
View duration
↑ 23%
Return viewers
↓ 31%
Drop-off rate

Chapters also let viewers share specific moments and revisit exact sections — boosting return-viewer signals that push your videos into broader recommendations.

3

How to add chapters to YouTube

Paste a formatted list of timestamps into your video description. YouTube detects them automatically — no special tools needed in YouTube Studio.

1
First timestamp must be 0:00 — always start at the beginning
2
Minimum 3 chapters required for YouTube to show them
3
Each line needs a descriptive chapter title after the time
YouTube Studio · Video Description
12345
0:00 Introduction & Overview
1:23 Getting Started
3:45 Core Concepts Explained
7:10 Advanced Tips & Tricks
12:30 Summary & Next Steps

TimestampAI outputs timestamps in exactly this format — ready to paste directly into your YouTube description with one click.

4

Manual vs. AI — the real time cost

Writing timestamps manually means re-watching your video from start to finish, pausing at each topic shift, and typing accurate timecodes. For a 30-minute video this takes 30–45 minutes of extra work per upload.

Manual
30–45 min
Re-watch → Pause → Type → Rewind → Repeat
for every video, every upload
VS
TimestampAI
< 30 sec
Paste URL or upload file → AI reads speech → Chapters ready
in under 30 seconds, every time

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about AI-powered video timestamp generation.

What is an AI timestamp generator?

An AI timestamp generator automatically analyses a video's audio and spoken content to identify distinct topics, scenes, or segments — then outputs formatted timestamps you can paste into YouTube or any video platform to create clickable chapter markers. TimestampAI uses advanced speech AI to do this in seconds.

How do I add YouTube chapter timestamps to my video?

Generate your timestamps with TimestampAI, then open your YouTube video in YouTube Studio, scroll to the Description field, and paste the timestamp list at the top or bottom of the description. Save the video — YouTube will automatically detect and display the chapters.

How accurate are the AI-generated timestamps?

TimestampAI is highly accurate for videos with clear speech and distinct topic changes. The AI analyses spoken words and content transitions to determine chapter boundaries. Results are generally excellent for tutorials, lectures, interviews, and podcasts. Accuracy may vary slightly for videos with heavy background music or minimal dialogue.

Do I need to create an account to use TimestampAI?

You can generate timestamps directly from the homepage without creating an account. Creating a free account gives you a job history, usage stats, and the ability to purchase additional credit packs when you need more generations.

What video formats are supported?

TimestampAI accepts YouTube URLs (any public YouTube video) and direct file uploads in MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and other common video formats. Simply paste the YouTube link or upload your file — the AI handles the rest.

How long does it take to generate timestamps?

Most videos are processed in under 30 seconds. Longer videos (60+ minutes) may take up to 2–3 minutes depending on the length and complexity of the content. You'll see a real-time progress indicator while the AI works.

How much does TimestampAI cost?

New users receive free credits to try the service instantly with no payment required. Additional credits are available in three packs: Starter (10 credits · $4.99), Pro (50 credits · $19.99), and Business (200 credits · $59.99). Credits never expire. We accept card payments and cryptocurrency.

Can I use TimestampAI for videos that are not on YouTube?

Yes. TimestampAI supports direct video file uploads, so you can process any video regardless of where it's hosted. Simply upload the MP4 or other video file and receive the AI-generated timestamps ready to use anywhere.

Free to start — no credit card required
